code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut state = 0
mut num_str = ""

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    -1
  end

  if b == 10
    if state == 3
      match string.parse_int(num_str)
      when Some(v)
        sum = sum + v
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    state = 0
    num_str = ""
  else
    if state == 0
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        ()
      else
        state = 1
      end
    else if state == 1
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        state = 2
      else
        ()
      end
    else if state == 2
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        ()
      else
        num_str = "#{num_str}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        state = 3
      end
    else if state == 3
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        match string.parse_int(num_str)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
        when None
          ()
        end
        num_str = ""
        state = 4
      else
        num_str = "#{num_str}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    else
      ()
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if state == 3
  match string.parse_int(num_str)
  when Some(v)
    sum = sum + v
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("sum=#{sum}")
